title: Admin Password Hashing
description: The system must secure all admin credentials by hashing passwords using Argon2id with salt.

title: Export Invoice PDF
description: Users must be able to click a button and immediately download a clean PDF version of their monthly invoice.

title: Button Click Tracking
description: The system should track whenever a user clicks the upgrade button for simple analytics data collection.

title: MFA Enforcement for Admins
description: Force multi-factor authentication setup for any user holding system administrative privileges.

title: Stripe Checkout Integration
description: Process customer mastercard and visa charges securely using the external Stripe API layer.

title: Color Scheme Update
description: Modify the primary application button colors from deep blue to slate gray for modern styling.

title: SQL Injection Prevention Filter
description: Implement a web application firewall ruleset to parse input streams and block malicious SQL injections.

title: Session Timeout Policy
description: Automatically terminate active user sessions and clear browser cookies after 15 minutes of idle time.

title: Font Style Optimization
description: Adjust global CSS configurations to load standard system sans-serif fonts uniformly.

title: Database Failover Setup
description: Configure secondary replica database clusters to automatically take over operations if master fails.

title: Auto-save Form Inputs
description: Periodically save form data drafts locally to local storage every 30 seconds to prevent data loss.

title: Change Footer Copyright Text
description: Update the text in the static footer component to accurately show the current calendar year.

title: Data Encryption at Rest
description: All customer personal data and healthcare identifiers must be fully encrypted using AES-256 protocols.

title: Generate Monthly Sales Report
description: Compile system transaction histories from the database into a downloadable spreadsheet file.

title: Animate Loading Spinner
description: Render a lightweight spinning icon while data payloads are being fetched from the server backend.
